bugs.root_cause: Function uses await but wasn't declared async

bugs.error_message: column documents.audio_file_path does not exist — ProgrammingError crashes ALL pipeline tasks
bugs.root_cause: Migration 021 partially applied: note_audio table created but 3 columns on documents table (audio_file_path, audio_duration_seconds, detected_language) were never added. Alembic version shows 022 as current, masking the gap. Every Document query by Celery crashed.
bugs.fix: ALTER TABLE sowknow.documents ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS for all 3 columns. Reset 2346 failed pipeline_stages to pending.

bugs.error_message: got Future attached to a different loop — entity_stage fails with RuntimeError
bugs.root_cause: _run_entities used AsyncSessionLocal inside asyncio.run(), but the module-level async engine's connection pool binds connections to the first event loop. Subsequent asyncio.run() calls create new loops, causing Future/loop mismatch.
bugs.fix: Rewrote _run_entities to use sync SessionLocal for DB ops. Added extract_entities_from_document_sync() to entity_extraction_service. Only the LLM HTTP call uses asyncio.run().

bugs.error_message: 'uses_vehicle' is not a valid RelationType — LLM returns relation types not in enum
bugs.root_cause: RelationType enum has a fixed set of values, but the LLM generates arbitrary relation types. ValueError crashes entity extraction.
bugs.fix: Wrapped RelationType() in try/except, falling back to RelationType.RELATED_TO for unknown types.
Changed to "flex-1 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden px-4 py-

bugs.error_message: Voice dictation not working on iPhone Safari — MediaRecorder fails with unsupported mimeType
bugs.root_cause: Hardcoded 'audio/webm;codecs=opus' mimeType not supported by Safari/iOS. Safari supports audio/mp4. Also hardcoded 'voice.webm' filename for transcription upload.
bugs.fix: Added MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported() fallback chain: webm → mp4 → browser default. Dynamic blob type from recorder.mimeType. Dynamic file extension in FormData upload.

bugs.error_message: Tag input in notes causes horizontal page scroll on mobile — user must side-scroll to reach tags
bugs.root_cause: TagAutocomplete chip container with overflow-x-auto expanded the page width because MobileSheet content area had no horizontal overflow constraint, and TagAutocomplete wrapper had no min-w-0 to respect flex container boundaries.
bugs.fix: Added overflow-x-hidden to MobileSheet content div, min-w-0 to TagAutocomplete wrapper, max-w-full to chip scroll container.

bugs.error_message: Vault unhealthy: cipher message authentication failed on unseal
bugs.root_cause: Dev .env had wrong VAULT_UNSEAL_KEY that did not match the key used to initialize the persistent Vault data volume.
bugs.fix: Updated dev .env VAULT_UNSEAL_KEY to match production key (0rlgxfRe...). Recreated vault container.

bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: agents should be summary
celery_completion probe fails: ModuleNotFoundError for tasks.guardian_tasks
bugs.root_cause: Wrong import path in docker exec python -c command: used tasks.guardian_tasks but correct path inside container is app.tasks.guardian_tasks (bind mount: ./backend:/app, code lives at /app/app/...)
bugs.fix: Changed from tasks.guardian_tasks to app.tasks.guardian_tasks in _check_celery_completion

bugs.error_message: redis_deep probe fails: PONG not in stdout (NOAUTH Authentication required)
bugs.root_cause: redis-cli subprocess calls in ProbesPlugin did not pass Redis password, so auth-required Redis returns NOAUTH instead of PONG
bugs.fix: Added _redis_cli_cmd() helper that injects --no-auth-warning -a {password} when password is configured

bugs.error_message: 94 pending incidents in daily health report despite successful auto-heals
bugs.root_cause: v2 plugin heals log success:True but dashboard/report counted healed as h.get("healed") only (v1 field). All plugin heal actions (success or not) were counted as pending.
bugs.fix: Updated all healed/failed detection: healed = h.get("healed") or h.get("success") is True
